creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
I received this message:

Maintainer:     vivek@khera.org
Last committer: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
Ident:          $FreeBSD: head/www/mod_authnz_crowd/Makefile 364740 2014-08-12 19:56:28Z amdmi3 $
Log URL:        http://beefy2.isc.freebsd.org/data/10amd64-default/2014-09-17_04h47m34s/logs/mod_authnz_crowd-2.2.2_3.log
Build URL:      http://beefy2.isc.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=10amd64-default&build=2014-09-17_04h47m34s
Log:

====>> Building www/mod_authnz_crowd
build started at Wed Sep 17 13:08:58 UTC 2014
 ...

The failure happens when mod_dav_svn is pulled in as a run-dependency. This fails because that is built against apache 2.4, but mod_authnz_crowd only works with apache 2.2, thus there is a conflict installing apache 2.4.

There is no workaround. The software is not compatible with Apache 2.4.

Please tell pkg-fallout that it should stop complaining about this until the upstream provides an updated version.
